elements.text: Adapted from Hernandez-Morales I, Van Loock M. An Industry Perspective on Dengue Drug Discovery and Development. Adv Exp Med Biol. 2018;1062:333-353.

Characteristics for successful partnerships: 
Shared mission and risks
Clear and realistic objectives, roles and responsibilities
Equal participation and power for decision making
Mutual but distinct benefits for each partner
Timely accomplished deliverables
Active collaboration 
Transparency and accountability
Clear legal and regulatory framework
Potential benefits: 
State of the art technology and research
Participation of pharmaceutical industry in NTD
Development of local capabilities in endemic (developing) countries
Investment and funding for NTD

Potential risks: 
Conflict of interest for intellectual property
Exceed allocated budget
Unforeseen situations not covered in the legal agreement
Source: (Widdus 2001, 2005, Austin 2000, Bagley 2013, Croft 2005, Demotes-Mainard J 2006)
